description: Update the public template from v0.3.2 to the immutable v0.3.3 stack release that contains native Hermes prompt-capability detection and validated WSL proof.
acceptance: R-1: The template requires stack version 0.3.3 and immutable ref v0.3.3 resolved to the published release commit.
R-2: The stack-update record preserves the before/after contract and exact resolved commit without absolute path leakage.
R-3: Clone-local, Linux/WSL, stack pairing, and live Hermes doctor checks pass without GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV=1.
verification: TMP="$(mktemp -d)" && STACK="$TMP/go-workflow-stack" && env -u GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV GO_STACK="$STACK" bash scripts/bootstrap-stack.sh >/dev/null && test "$(git -C "$STACK" cat-file -t v0.3.3)" = tag && test "$(git -C "$STACK" rev-parse 'v0.3.3^{commit}')" = 697f89baa8d43105a715b662c6f3b46d37ba8a4b

python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open('.go/updates/20260716T085634105634Z-v0.3.3-697f89baa8d4.json')); assert p['target']=='.go/project.json'; assert p['from_ref']=='v0.3.2' and p['to_ref']=='v0.3.3'; assert p['resolved_commit']=='697f89baa8d43105a715b662c6f3b46d37ba8a4b'; assert p['before_project']['required_stack_version']=='0.3.2'; assert p['after_project']['required_stack_version']=='0.3.3'"
TMP="$(mktemp -d)" && env -u GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV GO_STACK="$TMP/go-workflow-stack" GO_REQUIRE_LIVE_HERMES=1 bash scripts/check-linux.sh
TMP="$(mktemp -d)" && env -u GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV GO_STACK="$TMP/go-workflow-stack" bash scripts/check.sh

evidence.summary: R-1: official dry-run/apply updated the template to required_stack_version 0.3.3 and stack_ref v0.3.3, resolving the public annotated tag exactly to 697f89baa8d43105a715b662c6f3b46d37ba8a4b. R-2: generated rollback record .go/updates/20260716T085634105634Z-v0.3.3-697f89baa8d4.json validates target=.go/project.json, v0.3.2 to v0.3.3 before/after values, exact resolved commit, and no absolute paths. R-3 pre-close proof: projected final-state clone passed scripts/check.sh, GO_REQUIRE_LIVE_HERMES=1 scripts/check-linux.sh, fresh clone contract tests, native Hermes doctor ready with prompt -z, and template-check ok=true, all using an exact public v0.3.3 clone with GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV unset. Post-close gates passed on the real done-state: fresh public v0.3.3 bootstrap, clone-local check, Linux/WSL check, live Hermes doctor, and template-check all succeeded without GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV. Initial devil review B findings were repaired; final re-review verdict A.
